Navigations-Links überspringen
  • Überblick
  • Baum
  • Index
  • Suchen
  • Hilfe

    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    AAppc
    Base class of console-based apps.
    AInstrument
    Abstract device model which facilitates communication with synthesizes via MIDI system exclusive messages.
    ALL
    Run JUnit test cases.
    AMidiMonitor
    Instances of this class can be registered with MidiInterfaces in order to receive a log of MIDI input and output.
    ASyxTestCase
     
    BankTree<T>
    A tree whose leaves are bank objects, e.g., patches or multis.
    BankTree.IBankObject
    Interface to bank objects, e.g., patches or multis, stored in a bank tree.
    GettingStarted
    Basic coding examples.
    HandlingBulkData
    Coding examples of handling bulk data.
    IllegalStateError
    Error indicating an illegal data or program state.
    ILogger
    Interface to the global message logger.
    IMulti
    Implementations represent one synthesizer multi.
    IPatch
    Implementations represent one synthesizer patch.
    ISysexMessageListener
    Classes implementing this interface can register with MidiInterfaces in order to receive system exclusive messages.
    ISyxDataChangeListener
    Classes implementing this interface can register with SyxDataStructs in order to be notified when the system exclusive data have been changed by SyxDataStruct.setData(byte[], int) or SyxDataStruct.setData(byte[]).
    MidiInterface
    A physical or virtual MIDI interface with a MIDI in and a MIDI out device.
    NotSupportedException
    General operation-not-supported exception
    SysexRecorder
    Recorder for MIDI system exclusive messages and SYX file support.
    SYX
    SYX constants and static utilities
    SyxChecksum
    A system exclusive checksum data struct.
    SyxChecksumTest
     
    SyxDataStruct
    A structured system exclusive data buffer.
    SyxDataStruct.PTYPE
    Parameter types: SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.RAW: raw parameter without additional parameter information SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.RANGE: range of integer values SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.ENUM_INT: enumeration of integer values SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.ENUM_STR: enumeration of value names
    SyxDataStructTest
     
    SyxListMidiDevicesTest
     
    SyxMessage
    A structured MIDI system exclusive message.
    SyxMessageTest
     
    SyxParamInfo
    Instances of this class provide additional information for parameters of SyxDataStructs.
    TG55FormatSpecifiers
    Yamaha TG55 SyxEx message format specifiers (for test cases and tutorials).
